topic: Affective AI Design for iOS Relationships — Project Evolve Product Concept
content_preview: iOS 26 app design document for an emotional/relationship-training companion (Project Evolve). Covers: Liquid Glass UI integration, elemental companion evolution (formless→human), consent visual metaphors (blooming flower, intertwined streams, shared lantern, open gate, harmonious dance), 5 product variants (Quiet Haven, Reflecting Pool, Clear Path, Seasonal Garden, Vivid Dream), Relationship Training Model (RTM), stream aesthetic.
